record.field:
if records: # SQL Delete to bypass checks # Delete related records
# Sales Order Lines env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM sale_order_line WHERE order_id IN %s", (tuple(records.ids),))
# Chatter (Mail Messages, Activities, Followers) env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_message WHERE res_id IN %s AND model = 'sale.order'", (tuple(records.ids),)) env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_activity WHERE res_id IN %s AND res_model = 'sale.order'", (tuple(records.ids),)) env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_followers WHERE res_id IN %s AND res_model = 'sale.order'", (tuple(records.ids),))
# Finally delete sales orders env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM sale_order WHERE id IN %s", (tuple(records.ids),))

if records: # Chatter env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_message WHERE res_id IN %s AND model = 'crm.lead'", (tuple(records.ids),)) env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_activity WHERE res_id IN %s AND res_model = 'crm.lead'", (tuple(records.ids),)) env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM mail_followers WHERE res_id IN %s AND res_model = 'crm.lead'", (tuple(records.ids),))
# Finally delete leads env.cr.execute("DELETE FROM crm_lead WHERE id IN %s", (tuple(records.ids),))
